summary: Round-2’s missing-ref gap is mostly closed, but `verify.mjs` still accepts directory-valued configured refs, so a mutated `sharedVoiceRef`/`briefTemplateRef` can pass verify and then fail when runtime code tries to `readFile` it.

findings.title: Configured ref validation only checks existence, not that the target is a file
findings.recommendation: Validate `sharedVoiceRef` and `briefTemplateRef` with `statSync(...).isFile()` (or equivalent) instead of `existsSync` alone, and add a regression test that points one ref at an existing directory such as `voice/` and expects verify to exit non-zero.
